headline: Kimberly-Clark Kenvue Deal And New Tech Leader Reshape Growth Story
summary: Kimberly-Clark (NasdaqGS:KMB) plans to acquire Kenvue, expanding its reach in consumer health products. The company has appointed Francesco Tinto as Chief Information & Global Business Services Officer. The moves are intended to support business diversification and a stronger focus on technology and operational efficiency. Kimberly-Clark, trading at around $104.58 per share, comes into this news after a mixed share performance, with a 3.1% gain year to date but a 24.6% decline over the past...
